title: centaurea spinosociliata subsp. cristata
intro: Centaurea spinosociliata subsp. cristata, also known as the spiny thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a biennial plant that is native to the Mediterranean region and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory issues, and is believed to have antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. The herbal preparations of Centaurea spinosociliata subsp. cristata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
